prestazioni: M TwinPower Turbo S58B30T0 (3.0L inline-6) forced induction upgrade via Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbochargers with billet compressor wheels, 76mm inducer, and 106mm exducer, paired with a custom 4-inch titanium downpipe system from Fabspeed Motorsport, supporting 850+ WHP on E85 fuel with a Motec M150 ECU standalone management system

Full drivetrain reinforcement including an M Performance carbon fiber driveshaft, Wavetrac ATB differential with 3.15 final drive ratio, and a Sachs Performance Stage 3 dual-mass flywheel and clutch kit with cerametallic friction discs for 0-60 mph in sub-3.0 seconds

Suspension overhaul with KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers featuring 3-way adjustable damping (rebound, compression, and high-speed compression), spherical bearing top mounts, and 20mm front/15mm rear adjustable camber plates, paired with H&R 25mm front and 20mm rear anti-roll bars for Nürburgring lap times under 7:50
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit for the F93 X4 M, featuring carbon fiber fenders with 50mm extended wheel arches, custom front splitter with integrated canards, and a GT-style rear diffuser with dual 100mm titanium exhaust outlets from Akrapović Evolution Line

OEM+ carbon fiber exterior package including a G82 M4 CSL-style kidney grille with laser-cut M branding, carbon fiber mirror caps from 3D Design Japan, and a custom carbon fiber roof replacement (12kg weight reduction) with exposed weave finish

BBS FI-R 20x10.5 ET35 (front) and 20x12 ET45 (rear) forged wheels in matte gold, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/20 front, 315/25/20 rear), paired with AP Racing 400mm front and 380mm rear two-piece carbon ceramic brake rotors with monoblock 6-piston calipers
